Document:
# Brighteyes
[color=#999999][italic]Marrs...[italic][/color]
A extra-dimensional wanderer from “The Dark”.
A Shadekin often referred to by their burnt Kin and others as Bright-Eyes. Considered to be like their color-less eyed brethren, physically distinguished from their brighter and more vibrant colors within their eyes, varying wildly to many and much of the visual spectrum. The most significant difference is their tendency and ability to warp and bend the dark, whilst encompassed or even in the faintest of shadows they can bring forth such essence akin to energy, possessing influence over darkness itself.
